message:
feat(mux): add config editor, tab reorder, screen dump, and fix new tab rendering

- Add web-based config editor dialog (open_config reads file from server,
  edits in browser textarea, saves back with reload)
- Implement move_tab with server-side Layout.moveTab() and layout broadcast
- Implement write_screen_file/write_selection_file as browser downloads
  (server intercepts ghostty temp file, sends content to client)
- Fix new tab not rendering by setting layout.active_panel_id on panel
  creation so encode loop includes the new tab immediately
- Fix tab visibility using CSS visibility:hidden instead of display:none
  to prevent WebGPU 0x0 canvas initialization
- Fix tab ID mismatch between client/server with remap logic in
  handleLayoutUpdate
- Fix double-free crash in parseUploadFileList (folder upload) by using
  errdefer with initialized counter instead of manual free
- Remove duplicate goto_split commands from command palette
- Remove CSP frame-ancestors header blocking VS Code Simple Browser
- Clean up HTTP server headers (remove COOP/COEP, rewrite response logic)
- Add server-driven keybinding config with embedded HTML delivery
